task_completion.visual_evidence: The TopoCal application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Import the point cloud file 'stockpile_A.xyz' into TopoCal
task_completion.visual_evidence: An import dialog for ASCII/XYZ files is open, or the point cloud data is visible in the TopoCal workspace.

task_completion.description: Set the base elevation for the volume calculation to 1420.50 meters
task_completion.visual_evidence: A volume calculation dialog (e.g., 'Volumen con plano' in Spanish) is open with the base elevation (cota) input field set to 1420.50.

task_completion.description: Execute the volume calculation in TopoCal
task_completion.visual_evidence: A results window or output log in TopoCal displaying the calculated volume.
A text editor (like Notepad) is open showing the file 'C:\workspace\data\inventory_report.txt' with the text 'Volume: [value] m3'.

integrity.description: The agent used the TopoCal GUI to perform the volume calculation
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with TopoCal menus (e.g., 'Cálculos' > 'Volúmenes' or 'MDT' > 'Volumen con plano') and dialogs, rather than using terminal scripts to bypass the application.

integrity.description: The agent did not hardcode the expected volume without calculating it
integrity.visual_evidence: The volume value written to the text file matches the result actually displayed in the TopoCal calculation window. It should not magically appear as 37699.1 without prior calculation.

integrity.description: The agent used a text editor to create the report file
integrity.visual_evidence: A GUI text editor (e.g., Notepad) is used to write and save 'inventory_report.txt', rather than terminal echo commands.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected ground truth volume is 37699.1 m³ (±5% tolerance). The base elevation must be set to 1420.50 meters. TopoCal menus are in Spanish (look for 'Cálculos' > 'Volúmenes' or 'MDT' > 'Volumen con plano'). The final output must be saved to 'C:\workspace\data\inventory_report.txt'.
